description.ko: 유기적인 포드가 액체 빛을 숨 쉬듯 내보내며 빛나는 덩굴로 피어나는 고요한 심해의 개화.
description.en: A serene underwater bloom where organic pods breathe streams of liquid light into drifting glowing tendrils.

prompt: AURA-7 artwork, deep underwater organic flow: a quiet abyssal basin where translucent seed-pods unfurl from dark #2D5A3D mineral silt, their soft biomorphic shells glowing with #7FB069 inner life. Slow currents draw continuous streams of liquid light from the pods, forming #FFE66D luminous droplets, trailing filaments, and long glowing tendrils that rise through the water like breathing roots. The surrounding ocean is a misty #E6F2E1 haze filled with thousands of tiny bioluminescent plankton particles, faint caustic rays, and suspended pearly bubbles. Low-angle composition across the seabed, serene and weightless, wet translucent surfaces, no figures, no machinery, no hard geometry, gentle motion blur, high particle density, refined cinematic depth, detailed generative art.
